item.title: Societies Issue Pharmacologic Obesity Management Guidance
item.description: The Obesity Society, Obesity Medicine Association, and the Obesity Action Coalition have published joint guidance incorporating patient input. Medscap...

item.title: Vitamin D Deficiency Linked to Dry Eye Disease
item.description: Adults with a deficiency of vitamin D are at increased risk for developing dry eye disease than those without low levels of the nutrient, a study find...

item.title: New Hereditary Angioedema Drug Navenibart Safe, Effective
item.description: Unlike current treatments on the market for hereditary angioedema, navenibart requires dosing only every 3-6 months. Medscape Medical News

item.title: ‘Generation GLP-1’ Drives GLP-1-Friendly Food Marketing
item.description: Experts warn the label is ‘more marketing than medical’; urge following evidence on nutritional recommendations for GLP-1 therapy. Medscape Medical Ne...

item.title: Healthy Diet May Cut Cancer Survivors’ Premature Aging Risk
item.description: A recent study found reduced premature aging among childhood cancer survivors that adhered to established dietary guidelines. Medscape Medical News
